items.name: Wolf Fang
items.description: A single sharp fang dropped by a forest wolf. A reminder of the path you stood your ground on.

items.name: Wolf Pelt
items.description: Thick grey fur from the pack leader. Heavy and warm — a quiet badge of courage.

items.name: Feather of Flight
items.description: A glossy crow feather that catches the slightest breeze. Light as a wish.

items.name: Feather Bundle
items.description: A bundle of black feathers tied with a scrap of road-dust ribbon. Souvenir of the crow flock.

items.name: Tarnished Coin
items.description: An old copper coin dropped by a goblin. Worthless to merchants — priceless as a memory.

items.name: Enchanted Acorn
items.description: An acorn that hums faintly when held still. Given by an old apple tree that came back to its senses.

items.name: Pup's Trust
items.description: Not a thing you can hold — but you carry the memory of a little wolf pup licking your fingers.

items.name: Crystal Silk
items.description: A single strand of impossibly fine silk from a crystal cave spider. Glints rainbow in the light.

items.name: Iridescent Pearl
items.description: A pearl left behind by a gentle bog creature. Soft swirling colors inside.

items.name: Wisp Light
items.description: A soft blue glow you can carry in your palm. Lights up dark corners — and dark moods.

items.name: Silver Whistle
items.description: A tiny silver whistle gifted by the Mouse King. Blow it once to call the mice in time of need.

items.name: Silver Thread
items.description: A coil of bright silver thread from the field mice. 'For the road home,' the Mouse King said.

items.name: Stone Flake
items.description: A small stone chip from a Hammerhead's shoulder. Smooth as river-rock, heavy as a promise.

items.name: Winged Monkey Feather
items.description: A tail-feather from a winged monkey scout. Soft grey down on one side, leather-stiff on the other.

items.name: Bat Wing
items.description: A thin leathery wing-tip from the castle bat swarm. Useful proof you walked the witch's halls.

items.name: Kalidah's Claw
items.description: A long curved claw left by a Kalidah on the path. Earned by standing brave when running was easier.

items.name: Witch's Broom
items.description: The broomstick of the Wicked Witch of the West. Proof you faced the worst of Oz and stood tall.

items.name: Witch's Hat
items.description: The tall black hat of the Wicked Witch. Older than it has any right to be, light as ash.
